mapper.sql: id, tour_id, amount, category, payment_method, staff_user_id, receipt_image_url, note, approval_status, pay_status, approved_by_id, approved_at, batch_pay_ref, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM expenses WHERE approval_status != 'REJECTED' AND (payment_method = 'COMPANY_ACCOUNT' OR (payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND pay_status = 'PAID'))
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM expenses WHERE payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND pay_status = 'UNPAID'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM expenses WHERE tour_id = #{tourId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler} AND approval_status != 'REJECTED' AND (payment_method = 'COMPANY_ACCOUNT' OR (payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND pay_status = 'PAID'))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM expenses WHERE tour_id = #{tourId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler} AND payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND approval_status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND pay_status = 'UNPAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expenses WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod} AND approval_status = #{approvalStatus}

SELECT e.id, e.amount, e.category, e.receipt_image_url, e.approval_status, e.created_at, e.tour_id, t.tour_code, t.name AS tour_name, e.staff_user_id, u.name AS staff_name FROM expenses e INNER JOIN tours t ON e.tour_id = t.id INNER JOIN users u ON e.staff_user_id = u.id WHERE e.payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND e.approval_status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND e.pay_status = 'UNPAID' ORDER BY t.tour_code, u.name, e.created_at

SELECT e.id, e.created_at, t.tour_code, t.name AS tour_name, e.category, e.payment_method, e.amount, e.approval_status, e.pay_status FROM expenses e INNER JOIN tours t ON e.tour_id = t.id WHERE e.staff_user_id = #{staffUserId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler} ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.staff_user_id, e.amount, e.created_at, u.name AS staff_name, u.bank_name, u.bank_account_last4, u.phone FROM expenses e INNER JOIN users u ON e.staff_user_id = u.id WHERE e.payment_method = 'STAFF_ADVANCE' AND e.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND e.pay_status = 'UNPAID' AND e.created_at >= #{start} AND e.created_at <= #{end} ORDER BY u.name, e.created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE expenses SET tour_id = #{tourId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, amount = #{amount}, category = #{category, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, staff_user_id = #{staffUserId, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, receipt_image_url = #{receiptImageUrl}, note = #{note}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, pay_status = #{payStatus, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, approved_by_id = #{approvedById, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, batch_pay_ref = #{batchPayRef}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.lvying.mybatis.handler.UuidCharTypeHandler}
